holdings.infoBox: PILL is an equity ETF with a total of 68 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Pharmaceutical & Medical Bull 3X ETF (PILL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Pharmaceuticals Select Industry index. The fund provides 3x daily exposure to a modified equal-weighted index of pharmaceutical companies in the US. PILL was launched on Nov 15, 2017 and is issued by Direxion.
